creator: john@saltant.com
text:
This is a beta version of pandas. Release of 0.8.0 expected by the end of June. Testing and feedback are respectfully requested to identify any FreeBSD-specific issues.

Port developed on 9-STABLE (r236450) amd64. Compiles with base gcc and clang.

Please try building and testing on currently supported releases and stable branches.

# nosetests pandas
[snip]
Ran 1976 tests in 80.964s

FAILED (SKIP=43, errors=1)

The failed test has been reported here:
https://github.com/pydata/pandas/issues/1484

It is related to v1.0.1 of math/py-matplotlib, pending update per:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166329

Fix: Please commit this new port to the ports tree. An update will be forthcoming upon the release of 0.8.0.

Patch attached with submission follows:
